Name: MENU_INPUTGESTURE_PARAM
Description: Determines the input configuration for gestures.

Fields.Name: Input Key
Fields.Description: The main input key to detect.

Fields.Name: Shift Key
Fields.Description: The shift input key to detect.

Fields.Name: Enable Simple Display
Fields.Description: If ON, simple key guide may be displayed, otherwise only detailed key guide is shown.

Fields.Name: Key Guide Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID to use for the key guide. -1 will display 'data explanation' (debug function).

Fields.Name: Sound ID
Fields.Description: The sound ID to play when the input is triggered.
